params.name: Barina's Helmet
params.description: Barina's Helmet is a crystallization of the wisdom of Formula One car designers. The helmet has built-in vents and an integrated water cooling system, which can circulate water from the cooling jacket to maintain a perfect temperature of 52 degrees Celsius, reducing heat stress and allowing drivers to focus more on the race!
